task_completion.description: Mark 'Cloud Migration - Hyperion Systems' as Lost with reason 'Too Expensive'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Cloud Migration - Hyperion Systems' opportunity form in Odoo CRM showing a 'Lost' status (e.g., a red 'Lost' ribbon or banner) and the lost reason 'Too Expensive' displayed or selected in the corresponding dialog/field.

task_completion.description: Add 'At Risk' tag to 'ERP Implementation - Zenith Corp'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'ERP Implementation - Zenith Corp' opportunity form in Odoo CRM showing the 'At Risk' tag applied in the Tags field.

task_completion.description: Set Priority to Low (0 stars) for 'ERP Implementation - Zenith Corp'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'ERP Implementation - Zenith Corp' opportunity form showing the Priority field with 0 stars (unstarred/empty stars).

task_completion.description: Move 'Consulting Retainer - Apex Global' to the 'Negotiation' stage
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Consulting Retainer - Apex Global' opportunity form showing 'Negotiation' as the active/highlighted stage in the top-right status bar.

task_completion.description: Set Probability to 90% for 'Consulting Retainer - Apex Global'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Consulting Retainer - Apex Global' opportunity form showing '90' or '90.00' entered in the Probability field.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo CRM graphical user interface to make the updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Odoo web interface, opening opportunity records, and clicking/typing in the UI fields rather than using a terminal or API script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or python scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql, python, or xmlrpc scripts executing database updates directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the changes in the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the records in a saved state (e.g., the 'Save' button was clicked, or the UI reflects the updated values in a read-only or pipeline view) rather than just typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating three specific Odoo CRM opportunities based on their internal notes. The correct mapping (verified by the evaluation script) is: 1) 'Cloud Migration - Hyperion Systems' must be marked as Lost with the reason 'Too Expensive'. 2) 'ERP Implementation - Zenith Corp' must have the 'At Risk' tag added and Priority set to Low (0 stars). 3) 'Consulting Retainer - Apex Global' must be moved to the 'Negotiation' stage and have its Probability set to 90%.
